headline: NextEra Deal Recasts Dominion Energy As Data Center And Renewables Powerhouse
summary: NextEra Energy announced an agreement to acquire Dominion Energy (NYSE:D), creating one of the largest combined utility and clean power providers in the U.S. The deal is framed as an expansion of energy service to data centers, a fast growing source of electricity demand across key regions. The proposed transaction is subject to regulatory approvals that could affect timing, structure, or closing conditions. Dominion Energy, a major regulated utility with significant electric and gas...
